text:
Once upon a time there was a young elephant named Bessie. She lived a quiet existence under the canopy of lush trees. Every morning she liked to wander the forest with her best friend Woody, an old wise owl.

One day Bessie discovered a hidden grove filled with vibrant flowers. She felt drawn to them and ventured deeper. She had never seen such rainbow-coloured blooms before. Woody watched her curiosity bloom.

Together, they explored strange shapes atop the flowers. Suddenly, buzzing noises started. Woody whispered, “Something could be scary!” But Bessie just giggled and plucked a petalled thingie.

Then, one flower blossomed exceptionally. Bright sunlight pierced through where leaves hadn’t shown. Bessie leaned closer. Her eyes widened! Through the opening floated tiny twinkling lights. She reached out and touched them...

“Oh!” She let out a joyful cry. Suddenly, she floated. Woody tried to fly but fell back with a thunk. Bessie gigg
